zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland於1393年2月3日出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素時，他的父親Sir Henry Percy28歲，母親Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys21歲。他於1414年10月7日與Eleanor Neville在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1451年登記服兵役。他於1417年被列為he held the office of warden of the eastern march.。他去世於1455年5月22日在英國賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland于1393年2月3日出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克 卡素时，他的父亲Sir Henry Percy28岁，母亲Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys21岁。他于1414年10月7日与Eleanor Neville在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1451年登记服兵役。他于1417年被列为he held the office of warden of the eastern march.。他去世于1455年5月22日在英国賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾聖 阿爾班斯。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey

variants.name: Piercy

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland was born on 3 February 1393, in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, his father, Sir Henry Percy, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, was 21. He married Eleanor Neville on 7 October 1414, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1451. In 1417, at the age of 24, his occupation is listed as he held the office of warden of the eastern march.. He died on 22 May 1455, in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland est né le 3 février 1393, à Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Percy, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Neville le 7 octobre 1414, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1451. En 1417, à l’âge de 24 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est he held the office of warden of the eastern march.. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1455, à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à St Albans, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland am 3. Februar 1393 in Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Percy 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys 21. Er hat am 7. Oktober 1414 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England Eleanor Neville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1451 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1417, als er 24 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als he held the office of warden of the eastern march. aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Mai 1455 im Alter von 62 Jahren in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland è nato il il 3 febbraio 1393 nel Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry Percy, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Neville il 7 ottobre 1414, nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1451. Nel 1417, all'età di 24 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come he held the office of warden of the eastern march.. Morì il 22 maggio 1455, nel St Albans, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberlandが1393年2月3日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィック カストルで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Percyは28歳，母Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoysは21歳であった。1414年10月7日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックでEleanor Nevilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1451年に兵役登録をした。1417年，24歳の時，職業はhe held the office of warden of the eastern march.と記録されている。彼は1455年5月22日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスト アルバンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland(이)가 1393년 2월 3일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Percy(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1414년 10월 7일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 Eleanor Neville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1451년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1417년, 24세의 나이로 그의 직업은 he held the office of warden of the eastern march.이었다. 그는 1455년 5월 22일 영국 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 스트 알반스에 묻혔다.

pt.Lady Chapel of the Abbey, St. Albans, He: St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland nasceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1393, em Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Percy, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Neville em 7 de outubro de 1414, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1451. Em 1417, com 24 anos, sua profissão aparece como he held the office of warden of the eastern march.. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1455, em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland родился 3 февраля 1393 г. в местности алнвикк кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Percy было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Neville 7 октября 1414 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1451 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1417 году, в возрасте 24 лет, работал по профессии he held the office of warden of the eastern march. Он умер 22 мая 1455 г. в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности ст албанс, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Percy 2nd Earl of Northumberland nació el 3 de febrero de 1393, en Alnwick Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry Percy, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Mortimer Baroness Camoys, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Eleanor Neville el 7 de octubre de 1414, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1451. En 1417, a la edad de 24 años, su ocupación registrada era he held the office of warden of the eastern march.. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1455, en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en St Albans, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
